response.overview: The Right is a fictional story shaped by historical memory. A 73-year-old security guard at Dresden’s Old Masters Picture Gallery writes to the director of Muzeum Sztuki in Łódź, asking to volunteer there as an attendant. Beyond her own history as a Polish-German refugee in the 1940s, her wish is drawn by the museum’s avant-garde collection. From the Caravaggisti room in Dresden, she imagines another future for herself.
response.title: The Right
